scripts.check:json-syntax: node -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; for (const f of fs.readdirSync('data/API/json')) { if (!f.endsWith('.json')) continue; JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('data/API/json/' + f, 'utf8')); }"
scripts.check:js-syntax: node -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; import { spawnSync } from 'node:child_process'; const files = ['web/app.js', ...fs.readdirSync('web/js').map(f=>'web/js/' + f), ...fs.readdirSync('web/js/pages').map(f=>'web/js/pages/' + f)].filter(f=>f.endsWith('.js')); for (const file of files) { const result = spawnSync(process.execPath, ['--check', file], { stdio: 'inherit' }); if (result.status !== 0) process.exit(result.status || 1); }"
scripts.validate:schemas: ajv validate -s data/API/json-schema/festival.schema.json -d data/API/json/festival.json --spec=draft2020 --validate-formats=false && ajv validate -s data/API/json-schema/venues.schema.json -d data/API/json/venues.json --spec=draft2020 --validate-formats=false && ajv validate -s data/API/json-schema/performers.schema.json -d data/API/json/performers.json --spec=draft2020 --validate-formats=false && ajv validate -s data/API/json-schema/events.schema.json -d data/API/json/events.json --spec=draft2020 --validate-formats=false && ajv validate -s data/API/json-schema/venue-detail.schema.json -d data/API/json/venue-v1.json --spec=draft2020 --validate-formats=false && ajv validate -s data/API/json-schema/performer-detail.schema.json -d data/API/json/performer-p1.json --spec=draft2020 --validate-formats=false && ajv validate -s data/API/json-schema/event-detail.schema.json -d data/API/json/event-e1.json --spec=draft2020 --validate-formats=false
scripts.verify: npm run check:json-syntax && npm run validate:schemas && npm run check:data-referential-integrity && npm run check:js-syntax && npm run check:openapi && npm run check:seo-integrity && npm run check:assets-integrity && npm run check:fallback-integrity && npm run check:structured-data-integrity && npm run check:navigation-integrity && npm test
